data.title: Update fix-bug Sub-Agent Context Detection to prioritize Agent tool availability
data.description:
## Description

Modify fix-bug SKILL.md's "Detection Methods" subsection to make Agent tool availability the primary detection method (replacing orchestrator signal phrase as primary).

**File**: `plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md`

**Implementation**:
- Change `**Primary — orchestrator signal**` heading to `**Primary — Agent tool availability**` with description: "Before dispatching investigation sub-agents, check whether the Agent tool is available in the current context. If the Agent tool is not available, the skill is running as a sub-agent (dispatched via the Task tool) and must surface findings to the caller instead of escalating."
- Change `**Fallback — Agent tool availability**` heading to `**Fallback — orchestrator signal**` with description: "The orchestrator may also set 'You are running as a sub-agent' in the dispatch prompt. When present, this confirms sub-agent context."
- Keep both detection methods documented (neither deleted)
- Verify "Behavior in Sub-Agent Context" section remains consistent (no changes needed — already references Agent tool availability for ADVANCED/ESCALATED gating)

**Assumption documentation**: Agent tool availability is a reliable proxy for non-Task-sub-agent context. Evidence: 16 skills in this project use the SUB-AGENT-GUARD pattern which relies on Agent tool unavailability in Task sub-agents. This is the established project contract.

**TDD**: After this change, Task bdcd-a89b's `test_primary_detection_is_agent_tool` and `test_fallback_detection_is_orchestrator_signal` turn GREEN.

### Files to modify
- EDIT: `plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md` (Sub-Agent Context Detection section, lines ~596-600)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Skill file is valid markdown
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Primary detection method references Agent tool availability
  Verify: grep -qE '\*\*Primary.*Agent tool' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Fallback/Secondary references orchestrator signal phrase
  Verify: grep -qE '\*\*(Fallback|Secondary).*(orchestrator signal|running as a sub-agent)' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Both detection methods still documented
  Verify: grep -q 'Agent tool' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md && grep -q 'orchestrator signal' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] No other skill injects "You are running as a sub-agent" as primary signal to fix-bug (backward-compat audit)
  Verify: hits=$(grep -rl "You are running as a sub-agent" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v fix-bug | wc -l); test "$hits" -gt 0
